song.title: Leaning on the Everlasting Arms
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) What a fellowship, what a joy divine, Leaning on the everlasting arms! What a blessedness, what a peace is mine, Leaning on the everlasting arms!
[C] Chorus Leaning, leaning, Safe and secure from all alarms; Leaning, leaning, Leaning on the everlasting arms.
[V2] 2) O how sweet to walk In this pilgrim way, Leaning on the everlasting arms! O how bright the path Grows from day to day, Leaning on the everlasting arms!
[V3] 3) What have I to dread, what have I to fear, Leaning on the everlasting arms? I have blessed peace with my Lord so near, Leaning on the everlasting arms!
song.author: Elisha A. Hoffman, Anthony J. Showalter
